message:
Summary: ORIGINAL_OBJECTIVE: Build a task management web app where users can register, log in, and manage their tasks.

USER_CONTEXT:
- Framework: Flask
- Features: User authentication, Task CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
- Environment: Windows (PowerShell/Cmd detected)

TASK_TRACKING:
- ID 1: Define database models (User, Task) | Status: pending
- ID 2: Set up Flask application and authentication routes | Status: pending
- ID 3: Implement task management routes (create, list, update) | Status: pending
- ID 4: Create HTML templates for the UI | Status: pending
- ID 5: Verify application functionality | Status: pending

COMPLETED:
- Initialized project workspace.
- Created `requirements.txt` with Flask, Flask-SQLAlchemy, Flask-Login, and Werkzeug.

PENDING:
- Define SQLAlchemy models for Users and Tasks.
- Initialize Flask app and configure database.
- Implement login/registration logic.

CURRENT_STATE:
- Workspace contains `requirements.txt`.
- Agent is currently in an exploration/verification loop, repeatedly checking directory contents and the requirements file.

CODE_STATE:
- File: `requirements.txt` (Flask==3.0.0, Flask-SQLAlchemy==3.1.1, Flask-Login==0.6.3, Werkzeug==3.0.1)

CHANGES:
- Created `requirements.txt`.

DEPS:
- Flask, Flask-SQLAlchemy, Flask-Login, Werkzeug.

function.name: str_replace_editor
function.arguments:
{"file_text": "from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
from flask_login import UserMixin
from datetime import datetime

db = SQLAlchemy()

class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)

class Task(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
", "command": "create", "path": "/workspace/models.py"}

✅ VERIFICATION: File /workspace/models.py confirmed to exist (20 lines)

from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
from flask_login import UserMixin
from datetime import datetime

db = SQLAlchemy()

class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)

class Task(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)

from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
from flask_login import UserMixin
from datetime import datetime

db = SQLAlchemy()

class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)

class Task(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
